zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy於大約1111年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾時，她的父親Gronwy ab Owain40歲，母親Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw36歲。她於大約1142年與Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai在英國威爾斯安格萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在英國威爾斯享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy于大约1111年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾时，她的父亲Gronwy ab Owain40岁，母亲Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw36岁。她于大约1142年与Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai在英国威尔斯安格萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1150年在英国威尔斯享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Rhael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Arturo, Eloy, Juanita, Melecio, Orlando, Ramon, Seferino, Adelaido, Adolfo, Agustina.

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy was born about 1111, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gronwy ab Owain, was 40 and her mother, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, was 36. She married Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai about 1142, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1150, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy est née environ 1111, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gronwy ab Owain, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai environ 1142, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1150, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy um 1111 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gronwy ab Owain 40 und ihre Mutter Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw 36. Sie hat um 1142 in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy è nata il circa 1111 nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gronwy ab Owain, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai circa 1142, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1150, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhael Verch Ap Gronwyが約1111年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gronwy ab Owainは40歳，母Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlywは36歳であった。約1142年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイでLlywarch ap Bran Lord of Menaiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年にイギリスウェールズで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy(이)가 대략 1111년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gronwy ab Owain(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1142년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 영국 웨일스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy nasceu aproximadamente 1111, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gronwy ab Owain, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai aproximadamente 1142, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1150, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy родилась около 1111 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gronwy ab Owain было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai около 1142 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1150 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy nació aproximadamente 1111, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gronwy ab Owain, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Llywarch ap Bran Lord of Menai aproximadamente 1142, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1150, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
